transcript: Speaker A: আমার হাত ধরো। Hold my hand. Speaker B: Hold my hand. Speaker A: ধৈর্য ধরো। Have patience. Speaker B: Have patience. Speaker A: উপরে যাও। Go upstairs. Speaker B: Go upstairs. Speaker A: ঘুমাতে যাও। Go to bed. Speaker B: Go to bed. Speaker A: আমি তোমার ওপর রাগ করেছি। I am angry with you. Speaker B: I am angry with you. Speaker A: আমি জানি না। I don't know. Speaker B: I don't know. Speaker A: MySivi অ্যাপে আমার সাথে এমন ভাবেই বাংলায় কথা বলে ইংলিশ শিখুন। আমার সাথে যখন ইচ্ছে, যতক্ষণ ইচ্ছে প্র্যাকটিস করুন। স্পিকিং, গ্রামার, সেন্টেন্সেস, ঠিক শব্দ ব্যবহার - সব এক জায়গায়। [Learn English by speaking in Bengali with me on the MySivi app. Practice with me whenever you want, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentences, correct word usage - all in one place.]
on_screen_text: Amar haat dhoro / Hold my hand / dhorjo dhoro / Have patience / upore jao / Go upstairs / ghomote jao / Go to bed / Ami tomar opor rag korechi / I am angry with you / Ami jani na / I don't know / MySivi / sathe emon bhabei Bangla te kotha bole English / Amar sathe jokhon joto khon ichhe practice korun / Arya AI Teacher / Practice Now / Fluency Score / Your Learning Path / Talk about anything / Daily routine / Let's Improve Vocabulary / Talk about your childhood / Seasons and weather / Family and friends / Hobbies and / thik shobdo byabohar shob ek jaygay / MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: The ad showcases the MySivi app, where users can practice English by translating Bengali phrases. An AI avatar models the correct English translation, which a human user repeats. The ad promotes features like speaking, grammar, and vocabulary practice, concluding with a call to install the app.
